changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-perspectives/src/types.rs

`Perspective`, `PerspectiveFieldEntry`, and `SortEntry` all have exclusively public fields. Adding a new field to any of these is a breaking change for downstream consumers that construct them directly.

Suggestion: Make fields private with getters, or add `#[non_exhaustive]` to all three structs. Add builder methods (the `AddPerspective` command already uses builder style, so this aligns).
Perspective struct has all public fields -- semver hazard

Suggestion: Make fields private with getters, or add `#[non_exhaustive]` to all three structs. Add builder methods (the `AddPerspective` command already uses builder style, so this aligns).
\ No newline at end of file
